title: KEYCORP TO PRESENT AT THE MORGAN STANLEY US FINANCIALS, PAYMENTS & CRE CONFERENCE
text: CLEVELAND , May 24, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY) announced today that Chris Gorman, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, and Don Kimble, Vice Chairman and Chief Financial Officer, will present at the Morgan Stanley US Financials, Payments & CRE Conference in New York City on Monday, June 13, 2022, at 1:45 p.m. ET. KeyCorp plans to review its performance, strategy, and outlook.

title: KEYBANK AND BEACH POINT CAPITAL MANAGEMENT LAUNCH $1.5 BILLION MIDDLE MARKET DIRECT LENDING PROGRAM
text: KeyBank Beach Point Direct Lending Program will combine complimentary sourcing, underwriting and structuring capabilities for middle market borrowers CLEVELAND and SANTA MONICA, Calif. , May 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- KeyBank and Beach Point Capital Management ("Beach Point"), a credit focused investment manager, announced that they have established a new joint venture middle market direct lending program with $1.5 billion in lending capacity for U.S. middle market clients.

title: KeyCorp (KEY) Expands Digital Offerings, Acquires GradFin
text: KeyCorp's (KEY) acquisition of GradFin is in sync with its plans to strengthen digital product offering capabilities.

title: KeyBank Acquires Loan Forgiveness Counseling Service GradFin
text: KeyBank has acquired GradFin, a Philadelphia company that provides public service loan forgiveness counseling, according to a Monday (May 9) press release. Terms of the deal were not disclosed.

title: KEY FAMILY WEALTH RECOGNIZED FOR 'BEST FAMILY OFFICE SOLUTION' AT THE 2022 FAMILY WEALTH REPORT AWARDS
text: CLEVELAND, May 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Key Family Wealth, the multi-family office division of Key Private Bank, was named "Best Family Office Solution" at the 2022 Family Wealth Report (FWR) awards. The FWR awards showcase high-performing providers in global private banking, wealth management and advisor communities.

title: KEYBANK WEALTH MANAGEMENT'S JOE CALABRESE HONORED WITH LIFETIME ACHIEVEMENT AWARD AT THE 2022 FAMILY WEALTH REPORT AWARDS
text: CLEVELAND, May 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Key Private Bank, the wealth management division of KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY), proudly announces today that Chief Operating Officer Joe Calabrese received the Lifetime Achievement Award as part of the 2022 Family Wealth Report Awards. This award recognizes individuals who have dedicated their careers in wealth management to putting the needs of the families they serve first.

title: KeyCorp Raises Its Prime Lending Rate to 4.00 PERCENT
text: CLEVELAND , March 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY) and its banking affiliates have raised their prime lending rate to 4.00 percent from 3.50 percent, effective tomorrow, May 5, 2022. About KeyCorp KeyCorp's roots trace back nearly 200 years to Albany, New York.
